---
title: "visualizator.rmd"
author: "Aldair Martinez Pineda"
date: "2026-03-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

#load necesary packages
library(readxl)
library(stats)
#library(car)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggthemes)
library(dplyr)
library(bioseq)
library(stringi)
library(writexl)
library(ggpubr)
setwd("D:/rnarep") # here you need to add your working dir



predictionH5<-read_excel("crnaDDG.xlsx")
predictionH5crna<-read_excel("vrnaDDG.xlsx")


#positions are not properly posed
predictionH5$pos<-predictionH5$pos+1


predictionH5crna$pos<-predictionH5crna$pos+1



Model_linReg3.1<- readRDS("Model_linReg3.1.rds")






```


```{r}


####################functions of code.


#create a function for the calculus of the codon analysis

  databasepredictor<-function(predictions, neighbornum, neighborblocknum, modelselect, blocked, codon, orientation, correctionfactor) {

#create value for mismatch analysis
    
  targets<-predictions
  targets$match<-1
  targets[substr(targets$structure, 1, 1) ==".",]$match<-0
  targets$template <-gsub('T','U', targets$template)

#get only the columns of interest from or objetive sequence

  variables<-data.frame(DDG=targets$DDG, match= targets$match, adenine= targets$insertion, decalage=targets$decalage, neighbor =  targets$neighbor, matchmismatch= targets$matchmismatch)

#replace NA values for x

  variables[is.na(variables$adenine),]$adenine<-"X"

#transform the adenine column to 1 if the insertion is single adenine, and to 0 if it's different

  variables[variables$adenine=="A",]$adenine<-1
  variables[variables$adenine!=1,]$adenine<-0
  variables$adenine<- as.numeric(variables$adenine)
  
  
  
  
if (orientation=="crna"){
    
    
targets$pos=(rev(targets$pos) + correctionfactor)
targets$falsepos=targets$pos

}
#predict the insertion frequency 

  targets$predictedfreq <- predict.lm(modelselect, newdata=variables)

#create the vector containing samples

  samples<-unique(targets$sample)

#create the mask to select values
  masktargets2<-(targets$predictedfreq>-20 & targets$decalage!=0)

  predictionscutm<- targets[masktargets2,]

#change all predicted values that have a frequency not favorable by backtrack to -6
  if (blocked=="yes"){
      masktargets3<-(predictionscutm$pathway>2.5 | predictionscutm$neighbor>=neighbornum | predictionscutm$neighborblock>=neighborblocknum | predictionscutm$equilibrated<1 | predictionscutm$pathwayb>7.4)
      predictionscutm[masktargets3,]$predictedfreq=-6
  }
  
  if (codon=="yes") {
    predictionscutm[nchar(predictionscutm$insertion) %% 3 != 0,]$predictedfreq=-6 
    
  }

#this creates the logaritmic scale



#finally agrupate all positions using the sum of posibilities inside a position 
  predictionscutm$predictedfreqdec=10**(predictionscutm$predictedfreq)
  
#poli adenine insertions are always placed at the begining of the adenine stretch by variant callers, to simulate this behaivour we do the same mapping them
#at the begining of the adenine stretch
  
 predictionscutm$falsepos<-predictionscutm$pos
  
 selected8A<-unique(predictionscutm[grep(c("8A|RKKR"), predictionscutm$sample),]$sample)
 selected6A<-unique(predictionscutm[grep("6A", predictionscutm$sample),]$sample)
 selectedShim24a2b<-unique(predictionscutm[grep("Shim24a2b", predictionscutm$sample),]$sample)
 
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="A" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AA" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAA" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAA" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAA" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAAA" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAAAA" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAAAAA" & ((predictionscutm$sample %in% selected8A) | (predictionscutm$sample %in% selectedShim24a2b)),]$falsepos<-1017


 
 
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="A" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AA" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAA" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAA" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAA" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAAA" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAAAA" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAAAAAAA" & (predictionscutm$sample %in% selected6A),]$falsepos<-1019
 
 #do the same for the PR8
 
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="A" & (predictionscutm$sample=="PR8-C6a"),]$falsepos<-1013
 predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AA" & (predictionscutm$sample=="PR8-C6a"),]$falsepos<-1013
  predictionscutm[predictionscutm$insertion=="AAA" & (predictionscutm$sample=="PR8-C6a"),]$falsepos<-1013

 
 


 predictionscutm[(predictionscutm$decalage>7) & (predictionscutm$sample =="EF-8A") & (predictionscutm$pos>1011) & (predictionscutm$pos<1014),]$falsepos<-1013
 
 
#create the variable to agregate, transforming the log of observations to absolute frequency 

 predictionscutm$predictedfreqlog<- 10**(predictionscutm$predictedfreq)
 
 
 
 #modify the insertion variable to resemble real event annotation
 
 predictionscutm$insertion<-paste(as.character(predictionscutm$decalage), predictionscutm$insertion, sep = "")


#agregate the variables that share the same dummypos, decalage, sample, insertion, usign 

 predictionscutmfalse<-(aggregate(predictedfreqdec ~ falsepos + sample + insertion + template + decalage, data = predictionscutm, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE))
 
 
#remove insertions below treshold for easier visualization
 
 predictionscutmfalse[predictionscutmfalse$predictedfreqdec<10**-5,]$predictedfreqdec<-10**-7


  
  
  return(predictionscutmfalse)

  }



mergecrnaetvrna<-function(vrnacutsum, crnacutsum) {
  


  
  crnaplusvrna<-merge(vrnacutsum, crnacutsum, by.x=c("pos", "sample"), by.y=c("pos", "sample"), all=T)
  
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.x),]$predictedfreq.x<-min(vrnacutsum$predictedfreq)
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.y),]$predictedfreq.y<-min(vrnacutsum$predictedfreq)

  
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$HPAA.x),]$HPAA.x<-"N"
  crnaplusvrna[is.na(crnaplusvrna$HPAA.y),]$HPAA.y<-"N"

  
  crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq=pmax(crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.x, crnaplusvrna$predictedfreq.y)
  crnaplusvrna$HPAA=paste(crnaplusvrna$HPAA.x, crnaplusvrna$HPAA.y, sep = ",")
  
  
  #corrige the motifs that have NA values using dplyr, waring sintaxis change
  
  crnaplusvrna <- crnaplusvrna %>% mutate(wtmotifs = coalesce(wtmotifs.x, wtmotifs.y))
  
  crnaplusvrna <- crnaplusvrna %>% mutate(motifs = coalesce(motifs.x, motifs.y))
  
  crnaplusvrna <- crnaplusvrna %>% mutate(sampleshort = coalesce(sampleshort.x, sampleshort.y))

  crnaplusvrna <-crnaplusvrna[order(crnaplusvrna$sample, crnaplusvrna$pos, decreasing = FALSE), ]
  
  #view(crnaplusvrna)
  
  return(crnaplusvrna)

#get the biggest value from each sense 

  #allpredictionscut$predictedfreq.z=pmax(allpredictionscut$predictedfreq.x, allpredictionscut$predictedfreq.y)
  
}




inserorganizerv2 <- function(df) {
  
  library(dplyr)
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(.rowid = row_number())
  
  df_work <- df %>%
    filter(predictedfreqdec > 1e-6) %>%
    mutate(
      insertion_key = sapply(insertion, function(x) {
        seq_part <- gsub("^[0-9]+", "", x)
        paste(sort(strsplit(seq_part, "")[[1]]), collapse = "")
      })
    ) %>%
    group_by(sample, insertion_key) %>%
    mutate(
      totalfreq = sum(predictedfreqdec, na.rm = TRUE),
      keep_row = row_number() == which.max(predictedfreqdec),
      predictedfreqdec = ifelse(keep_row, totalfreq, 1e-7)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(-insertion_key, -totalfreq, -keep_row)
  
  df_ignore <- df %>%
    filter(predictedfreqdec <= 1e-6)
  
  df_out <- bind_rows(df_work, df_ignore) %>%
    arrange(.rowid) %>%
    select(-.rowid) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  return(df_out)
}



plotinsertions<-function(toplot, CS, start, end) {
  
  
 plotinser<-ggplot(toplot, aes(y = predictedfreqdec, x = falsepos))  + 
facet_wrap(~sample, ncol = 2, scales="free") + scale_y_log10() + theme(panel.spacing = unit(0, 'points')) + theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", # Needed to add the border
color = "black", linewidth = 1)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CS, col = "gray", linetype = "dashed", size=0.7) + theme_tufte() + theme(axis.line=element_line(), strip.text = element_text(size=11, family = "Arial"),  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1), text = element_text(size = 13, family = "Arial")) + scale_y_log10(limits=c(2*10**-6.5,2*10**-1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(start,end), breaks = toplot$falsepos) + geom_segment(aes(   x = falsepos, 
                   xend = falsepos, 
                      y = 2*10**-6, 
                   yend = predictedfreqdec), 
                   size = 10, 
                   alpha = 0.8,
                   color = "cyan4",
               show.legend =F) + geom_hline(yintercept = 2*10**-6, col = "brown", linetype = "dashed", size=0.7) + annotate("text", x = c(CS), y =c(2*10**-1), label = c("HA1  HA2") , color="violetred",size=3 , angle=0, fontface="bold") +
   geom_label_repel(aes(label=insertion), color="darkviolet" ,show.legend = FALSE, size=3.5, check_overlap = T, fontface="bold", force = 0.002, force_pull = 4, max.overlaps = 25) + geom_text(aes(x=falsepos, y= 2*10**-6.5, label=template), color="violetred" ,show.legend = FALSE, family="Arial") + scale_color_hue(direction = -1, h.start = 80) 

 
  
  
  
  
    return(plotinser)
  
  
  
}




```

```{r}


#this line predicts the insertions in your example sequences, and creates the xlsx ouput containing all insertions that should be obseved in a given sequence.
predictionH5[predictionH5$matchmismatch=="NOVALUE",]$matchmismatch<-"D"




#preidction match/ mismatch adjustment


predictionH5crna[predictionH5crna$matchmismatch=="NOVALUE",]$matchmismatch<-"D"




###here you divide H5 and H7 virus as they have a different numeric scale and 

#get the list of H7 an H5 for romain

codon<-databasepredictor(predictionH5, 15.5, 9, Model_linReg3.1, blocked = "yes", codon = "no",orientation = "vrna", correctionfactor = "N")



#now do the analysis for the vrna version of every part


codoncrna<-databasepredictor(predictionH5crna, 15.5, 9, Model_linReg3.1, blocked = "yes", codon = "no",orientation = "crna", correctionfactor = 18)


#final step 




##organize insertions to graph


codon<-inserorganizerv2(codon)

codoncrna<-inserorganizerv2(codoncrna)



```



```{r}

codon$insertion <- sub("^[0-9]+", "", codon$insertion)

codoncrna$insertion <- sub("^[0-9]+", "", codoncrna$insertion)



#xport data to xlsx format

codonexport<-codon

codoncrnaexport<-codoncrna

codonexport[codonexport$predictedfreqdec<10**-6]$predictedfreqdec<-"BELOWthreshold"
codoncrnaexport[codoncrnaexport$predictedfreqdec<10**-6]$predictedfreqdec<-"BELOWthreshold"

write_xlsx(codonexport[order(codonexport$sample,codonexport$falsepos),], "predicted-crna-template.xlsx")

write_xlsx(codonexport[order(codonexport$sample,codonexport$falsepos),], "predicted-vrna-template.xlsx")


```




```{r, fig.height=50, fig.width=12}

#view crna, remove exrtreme values


#reduce the insertion variable 


#codon[codon$predictedfreqdec<10**-5,]$predictedfreqdec<-10**-7
#codon$falsepos<-codon$pos

windowsFonts(Arial = windowsFont("Arial"))


codon[codon$sample=="2008-H7N7-8A" & codon$falsepos=="1017" & codon$predictedfreqdec>10**-6,]$falsepos<-1013




plotvrna<-plotinsertions(codon, 1026, 1012, 1030)

suppressWarnings(print(plotvrna))


#eclipse long insertion in the extreme of poliA stretch as they are likely to be mapped in the 5' extreme of the poliA stretch during vRNA syntesis, and are already
#present in the vRNA syntesis plot.


codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AA",]$falsepos<-10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AAA",]$falsepos<-10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AAAA",]$falsepos<-10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AAAAA",]$falsepos<-10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AAAAAA",]$falsepos<-10



codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AGAAAA",]$falsepos<-10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AGAAAAA",]$falsepos<-10
codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="AGAAAAAA",]$falsepos<-10
#codoncrna[codoncrna$insertion=="TGG",]$insertion<-"UGG"

#finally mapp correctly the AGA insertion in the H7N7-2008 virus, as this insertion is in reality observed as the GAA insertion

codoncrna[codoncrna$sample=="2008-H7N7-5A" & codoncrna$falsepos=="1022" & codoncrna$insertion=="AGA",]$falsepos<-1021

codoncrna[codoncrna$sample=="2008-H7N7-5A" & codoncrna$falsepos=="1021" & codoncrna$insertion=="AGA",]$insertion<-"GAA"

codoncrna[codoncrna$sample=="2008-H7N7-5A" & codoncrna$falsepos=="1021",]$template<-"G"





plotcrna<-plotinsertions(codoncrna, 1026, 1012, 1030)

suppressWarnings(print(plotcrna))



#save figures in raw format 


ggsave(plotvrna, 
       filename = "fullplot-crna-as-template.png",
       device = "png",
       dpi = 400,
       limitsize = FALSE,
       height = 50, width = 12, units = "in")



ggsave(plotcrna, 
       filename = "fullplot-vrna-as-template.png",
       device = "png",
       dpi = 400,
       limitsize = FALSE,
       height = 50, width = 12, units = "in")









```
